name: Marketing 360
description:
What Marketing 360 Does?

Marketing 360® makes it easy to update your business information on the most important sites and lets your customers find you easily. It also offers reputation management and social media management tools.

Source: G2

‍

Features:

➡️ Marketing 360 provides a complete suite of tools and services for digital marketing, eliminating the need for businesses to use multiple platforms or agencies.

➡️ By consolidating marketing tools and services into one platform, Marketing 360 saves businesses time and resources that would otherwise be spent on managing multiple platforms or hiring multiple agencies.

➡️ With Marketing 360, teams can collaborate more efficiently on marketing campaigns and projects, thanks to its centralized platform and communication tools.

➡️ Marketing 360 offers customizable solutions tailored to the specific needs and goals of each business, ensuring that they get the most out of their marketing efforts.

➡️ Whether a business is a small startup or a large enterprise, Marketing 360 can scale to accommodate its growth and evolving marketing needs.

Benefits:

⭐️ Marketing 360 provides an easy-to-use website builder with customizable templates, allowing businesses to create professional-looking websites without any coding knowledge.

⭐️ The platform includes CRM tools to help businesses manage customer interactions, track leads, and nurture relationships.

⭐️ Marketing 360 offers email marketing tools to create and send targeted email campaigns, automate follow-ups, and track engagement metrics.

⭐️ With Marketing 360, businesses can manage their social media accounts, schedule posts, monitor mentions, and track performance across multiple platforms.

⭐️ The platform includes tools for managing online advertising campaigns across various channels, such as Google Ads, Facebook Ads, and Instagram Ads.

⭐️ Marketing 360 provides comprehensive analytics and reporting features to track the performance of marketing campaigns, measure ROI, and identify areas for improvement.

⭐️ The platform helps businesses monitor and manage their online reputation by tracking reviews, responding to feedback, and generating positive reviews from satisfied customers.

Pros:

✅ Has a fully integrated dashboard 

Cons:

❌ Customer Support team is not considered to be very reliable 

❌ Offers limited local SEO features

‍

Offers Custom Pricing Options
